subcodes.first_line: O My brother and My beloved! Many days have passed - each moment whereof hath been as a century - and no tidings have been received from thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اخی و حبیبی مدتها گذشت که هر آن آن قرنی بوده و از آنجناب خبری مسموع نیفتاد
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @suffering and imprisonment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
